---
title: "Water Chemistry"
author: "Mariah Kachmar"
date: "2026-05-11"
output: html_document
description: 
---


#Set working directory
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/mariah.kachmar/documents/Github/EAD-ASEB_EPA_LISS_Disease_Surveillance') #Mariah's
#knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/kyra.lenderman/documents/Github/EAD-ASEB_EPA_LISS_Disease_Surveillance') #Kyra's
#knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/sarina.dery/documents/Github/EAD-ASEB_EPA_LISS_Disease_Surveillance') #Kelly's
```

#run packages
```{r}
library("ggplot2")
library("readxl")
library("plyr")                                     
library("dplyr")
library("Rmisc")
library("readr")  
library("lubridate")
library("purrr")
library(reshape2)
library(stringr)
library("RColorBrewer")
library("stringr")
library("tidyverse")
library(ggh4x)
library(wacolors)
library(glmm)
library(glmmTMB)
library(effectsize)
library("mgcv")
library("car")
```

#Set Path
```{r}
path_out <- 'Field_Data_WaterChemistry/output/'
```

#read data files
```{r}
data_all <- list.files(path = "Field_Data_WaterChemistry/raw_data",                           # Identify all CSV files
  pattern = "*.csv", full.names = TRUE) %>% 
  lapply(read_csv, skip = 1) %>%                              # Store all files in list
  bind_rows                                         # Combine data sets into one data set 
data_all                                            # Print data to RStudio console

as.data.frame(data_all)                            # Convert tibble to data.frame


#dates - adding month and year

data_all <- data_all %>% dplyr::rename(c( "Date_collected" = "Date collected" , "site" = "Location" ))

data_all

#for some reason not all of the dates are cooperating need to fix this for below****
data_all <- data_all %>% dplyr::mutate(Date_collected = as.Date(Date_collected, format = "%m/%d/%Y"), month = month(Date_collected), year = year(Date_collected))

data_all

data_all <- data_all %>% filter(!is.na(Date_collected))
data_all

```

#Aragonite Saturation ('WAr out')
```{r}

aragonite_master_long<- data_all %>%  
                      reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("Date_collected", "site","month","year"),
                                    measure.vars = c("Salinity","t(oC) field","pH out","pCO2 out (matm)","HCO3 out (mmol/kgSW)","CO3 out (mmol/kgSW)","CO2 out (mmol/kgSW)","WAr out","xCO2 out (dry at 1 atm) (ppm)"))
head(aragonite_master_long)


monthly_aragonite_plot <- ggplot(data=aragonite_master_long %>% 
          filter(variable == "WAr out"), aes(x=month, y=value, fill=site)) +geom_point()+ #scale_fill_manual(values=c("forestgreen","orange", "purple"))
  theme_bw() + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20))+ theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12))+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size =15))+
  labs(title="Monthly Aragonite Saturation", x ="", y = "Aragonite Sauration (Ωar)")+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,2), breaks = seq(0, 2, by = 0.2))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:12) +
theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 12))+theme(legend.position = "none")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "red", size = .5) +  #red line is at equilibrium 
facet_grid(site ~ year, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x")

monthly_aragonite_plot

mean_aragonite_plot <- ggplot(
  data = aragonite_master_long %>%
    filter(variable == "WAr out"),
  aes(x = factor(year), y = value, fill = site)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)) +
  labs(title = "Mean Yearly Aragonite Saturation ", x = "Year", y = "Aragonite Saturation (Ωar)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2),breaks = seq(0, 2, by = 0.2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "red", size = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~site)

mean_aragonite_plot

pdf(paste0(path = "Field_Data_WaterChemistry/output" ,"/Mean_Aragonite__all.pdf"), height = 7, width = 13)
print(mean_aragonite_plot)
dev.off()
```

#Lets graph seasonal means for each year
```{r}

seasonal_aragonite <- aragonite_master_long %>%
   dplyr::filter(variable == "WAr out") %>%
   dplyr::mutate(
    season = case_when(
      month %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
      month %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Spring",
      month %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Summer",
      month %in% c(9, 10, 11) ~ "Fall"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(site, season, year) %>%
   dplyr::summarize(
    mean_WAr = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_WAr = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = sum(!is.na(value)),
    se_WAr = sd_WAr / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

seasonal_aragonite


seasonal_aragonite_plot <- seasonal_aragonite %>% filter(year != "2026") %>%
  mutate( season = factor( season,levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Fall"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = season, y = mean_WAr, color = season, group = season)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_WAr - se_WAr,
                    ymax = mean_WAr + se_WAr),
                width = 0.2, color= "black") +
  facet_grid(site ~ year, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20))+ theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14))+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size =15))+
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"), legend.text = element_text(size = 14))+
  labs(
    title = "Seasonal Mean Aragonite Saturation",
    x = "Season",
    y = expression(Omega[ar])
  ) +
   scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2),breaks = seq(0, 2, by = 0.2)) +
  scale_color_manual(
  values = c(
    "Winter" = "#56B4E9",  # sky blue
    "Spring" = "#009E73",  # bluish green
    "Summer" = "#E69F00",  # orange
    "Fall"   = "#D55E00"   # vermillion
  ))+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "red")

seasonal_aragonite_plot

pdf(paste0(path = "Field_Data_WaterChemistry/output" ,"/Seasonal_Aragonite__all.pdf"), height = 7, width = 13)
print(seasonal_aragonite_plot)
dev.off()

```
